description: Generic form field wrapper providing a label (with optional required marker), help text, error message display, and a slot for any form control. Applies error styling when an error message is set.

examples.title: Form field with label and help text
examples.code:
<TmFormField Label="Username" Required="true" HelpText="Must be at least 3 characters." For="username">
    <input id="username" type="text" @bind="model.Username" />
</TmFormField>
